description: You are a Data Manager for a longitudinal cohort study. Your goal is to identify participants who completed the baseline assessment but failed to attend their 6-month follow-up visit. Using Epi Info 7, create a project named 'CohortRetention' and process the data from 'Baseline_Jan2024.csv' and 'Followup_Jun2024.csv' (located in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Data'). Identify participants present in the baseline data who do not have a corresponding record in the follow-up data. Export this list of 'lost' participants, including columns for ParticipantID, FirstName, LastName, and Phone, to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Output\CallList.csv'.
